title: pyrethrum inodorum
intro: Pyrethrum inodorum, also known as Chinese pyrethrum or Japanese chrysanthemum, is a flowering plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae) that is native to East Asia. The medicinal properties of Pyrethrum inodorum lie in its ability to reduce inflammation, relieve fever, and calm the nervous system due to its flavonoid and sesquiterpene compounds. The health benefits of this plant include its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of anxiety, insomnia, and digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the flowers of Pyrethrum inodorum are often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to promote relaxation and overall well-being.
